# ane-tts

> Accelerating TTS inference on Apple Silicon via CoreML. Targeting Fish S2 Pro (5B) on consumer Macs.

## Problem
Fish S2 Pro (5B params, best open-source TTS) runs at 0.69x RTF on Metal GPU via MLX. Sub-realtime. The ANE (15.8 TOPS) sits idle during inference.

## Approach
Direct CoreML conversion of Fish's slow AR transformer (src/convert_direct.py). Faithful architecture: QK norm, RoPE, GQA with correct repeat_interleave, SwiGLU, no bias. Pipeline parallelism: slow AR on GPU + fast AR on ANE concurrently.

## Status
Research phase COMPLETE (14 experiments on M2 Max). Direct CoreML conversion VERIFIED. ANEMLL path ABANDONED.

### PROVEN (verified with parity tests)
- Slow AR: 24.3ms/token on CoreML GPU — 1.43x faster than MLX (34.7ms)
- Slow AR RTF: 46.4ms audio / 24.3ms = 1.91x real-time (slow AR stage only)
- CoreML parity: cos=0.9999988, top-5 tokens identical to PyTorch reference
- Model: /tmp/fish_slow_ar_direct.mlpackage (325 tensors from Fish safetensors)
- Research-phase timing data (Experiments 0.2-14): pipeline profiling, ANE characterization, Swift GCD 45-51% overlap

### ESTIMATED (from valid components, not measured end-to-end)
- Full pipeline sequential: 24.3 + 32 = 56.3ms/token, 0.82x RTF
- Full pipeline with parallelism: max(24.3, 32) = 32ms/token, 1.45x RTF

### NOT proven
- KV cache integration
- Full pipeline end-to-end RTF
- Audio output quality
- Quantization impact

### ABANDONED
- ANEMLL path: FFN chunks produced cos=0.19 output. All ANEMLL benchmarks (45ms, 1.03x RTF) are INVALID.
- Phase 1 ANEMLL parity tests had hidden GQA bug (.repeat vs .repeat_interleave) — both sides wrong, tests passed anyway.

## Key Tools
- coremltools — Apple's official CoreML conversion (primary path)
- maderix/ANE (github.com/maderix/ANE) — direct ANE access, 6.2K stars
- mlx-audio — current TTS inference baseline (Metal GPU)

## Models
- Fish S2 Pro 5B BF16 (~10GB) — target model, best quality
- Qwen3-TTS 1.7B BF16 (~4GB) — potential draft model
- Qwen3-TTS 0.6B 4-bit (~1GB) — small draft model for ANE

Decision tree at docs/DECISION_TREE.md. Lab notebook at docs/LAB_NOTEBOOK.md.
